messages.bodyPreview:
Hi again Ben,

Thanks for meeting with me.

Please see proposed mutual separation agreement attached, as well as more
information regarding the outplacement support. Regarding a follow up call
tomorrow - would 1:30pm work?

Best,
Ebba

Hi Ebba,

Hope you're doing alright given he circumstances. I'd appreciate it if we
could put in some time later this week (Thursday or Friday) to touch base.
I've been helping organise a few things as I just got back Monday and
people need support too.
With the reorganisation announcements tomorrow and today there's a lot of
worried people so I'm focussing on:
1) rallying the changes in AI, we've been prepping for a while and they're
just panicking when for us, it's just a continuation
2) he...

Hi Ben,

Thanks for the note, and I appreciate you sharing the context.

I also want to acknowledge the care you’re showing for the team during
times of change and many unknowns. At the same time, as Adrian and I shared
in our conversation, we’d strongly encourage you to shift your focus to
yourself at this point. With the reorg communication going out, it’s
important that we use our time to focus on what the path forward will look
like for you. As discussed, the purpose of reconnecting is to...

Hi Ebba,

Thank you for the time yesterday. Our conversation gave me a lot to process.

My partner is taking today off so we can properly evaluate the personal and
financial implications of the current proposal on our life here in Sweden.
I am also currently waiting for Unionen to get back to me on the initial
text of the agreement. They seem to be taking longer than expected to
review the legal ramifications (and I’m no expert on legal text!), so I’ll
be calling them today to check on their...

Hi Ben,

Thanks for sharing your questions. I’ve shared them with Adrian and will
align with him regarding the assessment.

Regarding your question on the nature of the proposed separation, I can
confirm that this is being treated as a leadership decision, with them
considering a mutual separation agreement as the preferred option.

Please take some time over the weekend to consider the settlement
agreement, I fully understand it's a big decision for you and your partner.

Hi Ebba,

Writing to follow up on our last conversation. I haven’t yet received the
written clarifications regarding the nature of the separation and the
assessment methodology used for the new organization. As we discussed,
having these facts in writing is essential for me and my Unionen
representative to review the proposal fairly.

To help us move forward, I need to request that my formal *2025 Talent
Snapshot* be finalised and shared with me. I understand the company-wide
deadline was Jan...

Hi Johan,

Moving this conversation to my personal email thread (where I was
previously communicating with Ebba) to ensure I have persistent access to
our correspondence. Please ensure all future correspondence regarding this
matter is directed to this address (benpurslow@gmail.com).

Thank you for the written clarification. It is helpful to have your
confirmation that this is *"not a retrospective audit of my technical track
record"* but rather a forward-looking leadership decision. This con...

Hi Johan,

Thank you for the conversation yesterday. I appreciate the open
conversation and the direction we're heading. I wanted to capture what we
discussed so we're aligned on next steps.

Agreed next steps from yesterday:

   1. We agreed to explore both the mutual separation agreement and
   potential IC redeployment in parallel, rather than sequentially. Both
   tracks remain open.
   2. I will work on identifying areas where my skills and experience align
   with business needs in an I...

Hi Ben,

Thanks for the summary. The steps reflect my view well, and I have nothing
to add. Let's maintain momentum during next week and I once again encourage
you to focus on yourself.

Here is the response to your questions in the agreement.

This is our standard agreement, so we’re not in a position to modify it but
I’ll provided more details below in blue so you have more context in
written on how it will work in practice:

Clause 2.1: Benefits and holiday pay need to be specified, in par...

Hi Ben,

Thanks again for the conversation. I want to briefly recap where we landed
to ensure we’re aligned.

*1. The role (discussion with Adrian on Monday)*
You shared concerns that perception and past track record might work
against you and impact your ability to succeed in the role.

My advice: first align fully with Adrian on expectations, scope, and what
success looks like. If you decide to move forward, we should do so with
clear intent to make it successful - including agreeing upfron...

Hi Johan,

Thanks for the recap, helpful to have things in writing. A couple of points
I want to clarify so we're working from the same understanding.

Hi Ben!

Thank you for your email.

You may refer to any one of us. If none of us are available, another advisor will always take over.
I wish you a nice day!

Hälsningar

Helena Borg Jodelsohn 
Facklig Rådgivare

Unionen

Kontaktinformation och öppettider
www.unionen.se/kontakt<http://www.unionen.se/kontakt>

Få krafter utöver det vanliga. På jobbet.

Vill du få ökat inflytande/möjlighet att påverka på din arbetsplats? Här kan du läsa om att bilda klubb: Påverka på jobbet – bli förtroendeval...

Hi Ben,

I missed this e-mail. Sorry for the delay.

That is correct. It's a redeployment offer that Adrian wants to align with
you. It's the role at hand or the seperation agreement.

Also wanna remind you that I am confident the formalities in the agreement
will be sorted so appreciate if you can also get back to me on the monetary
aspect. As long as it's still an option.

Thank you

-------------------
Johan Sellgren | HR Business Partner, Experience Mission
| sellgren@spotify.com | Regeri...

Hi Johan,

I've been reflecting on our conversation yesterday. I wanted to capture a
few things in writing so we're aligned on where we are now.

You proposed to withdraw the separation agreement, which was a process
Spotify initiated. I understand that's your current position, and I've
noted it. I'd expect that conversation could be revisited if circumstances
change on either side.

Adrian and I have had productive conversations about scope, and I'm engaged
with that process. What I have at...

Hi Ben,

Following up on our conversations, we can offer you the role of *Staff
Engineer*, reporting to Adrian Ford as outlined and discussed.

You’ll find the main responsibilities outlined in the attached job
description,
<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1evbcJarKpawJXH4qB6JdTaXqv3yP5xCvYLJS305ipe8/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.g54jz8lsravl>
but as you onboard to the role, you and Adrian will need to define
objectives and focus areas together.

The role is full-time and based either at Urban Es...

Hi Johan,

Thanks for your email on 4 March. I've been reviewing it and have a
few questions before I can give you a considered response.

When we last spoke, you mentioned I'd work out the success criteria
with Adrian to avoid the subjectivity of my current situation. We'd
discussed it but I haven't received anything official yet, and with
him out until 16 March I'm not clear on how that gets resolved
beforehand. I'd want a proper understanding of what success looks
like, something concrete...

subject: Jose Manuel or Helena Borg Jodelsohn - (Benjamin Purslow - Spotify)
summary: Jose Manuel or Helena Borg Jodelsohn - (Benjamin Purslow - Spotify)

messages.bodyPreview:
Hi Jose / Helena,

I hope you're both well. I'm writing with two things: a development on the agreement clauses, and a follow-up on my earlier email that I haven't heard back on yet.

1. Employer's Response to Clause Feedback

I forwarded Helena's clause observations to Spotify HR (Johan Sellgren, HRBP). His response came on the 13th February. Summary below — I'd appreciate your formal counter-positions on each, particularly the flat rejections and the competitor clause.

Clause 2.1 (Benefits...

Hi Johan,

Thanks for sending this. I'm forwarding it to my personal email as I've previously requested, so that I have a permanent record of the document.

I'll review it and come back with any questions.

Thanks,
Ben

Hi Johan,

Thanks for sending through the amendment. I've had a chance to review it and have two points I need addressed.

1. I've done the work with Adrian to understand the practical need here and what I'd need to do to make this transition work. But the amendment is a role change on paper and nothing more. There's nothing in it that acknowledges the broader context, nothing that reflects what Spotify is committing to in practice, and no indication of what HR's role and responsibilities are...

Thanks for your note - happy to clarify.

1. The amendment reflects the formal role change, similar to how your employment contract outlines the framework of employment rather than operational details. It is not intended to capture broader context or internal ways of working. There are no changes to your employment terms beyond the role itself, and HR will continue to support the transition in line with standard practice.

2. In relation to the March compensation review, we assessed your sala...

Hey Johan,

Thanks for coming back to my questions. You've confirmed the amendment is a role change on paper with no changes beyond the title, and that the comp review is closed with my salary unchanged. I note that but it confirms we're on different pages about what constitutes an offer, and I think that's why it feels like we're each delayed on the other. For example, I raised compensation on 9th March; it took until now to get a response, by which point the review window had closed.

So le...

Hi Ben,

Thanks for outlining your perspective. I understand that you're looking for a more holistic view of what this transition entails.

Let me address your points directly:

- Compensation - As mentioned, compensation has been assessed in relation to the *new* role. This assessment is based on the scope and level of the Staff Engineer role and aligns with our internal benchmarks. In your case, the outcome is well positioned within - and above - the expected range for this level. When chan...

I realise I mixed up the days and that it's already Thursday, my apologies. We can extend the timeline until end of business tomorrow.

If we're not able to reach an agreement, we would need to explore next steps, which may include consultation with your union (if applicable). In that case, I'd appreciate it if you could confirm whether you're a member and, if so, which union you belong to.

Thank you

Hi Johan,

I had hoped we'd been working toward a mutually beneficial outcome this week, and that we were close to aligning on something that reflected both the contribution I've made to Content Platform and the role you're asking me to step into. Your response suggests otherwise — there's been no acknowledgement of what I've delivered, and nothing on the table beyond a title change.

Given that you've raised the possibility of involving my union, it's clear we're further apart than I thought...

Hi Johan,

I had hoped we'd been working toward a mutually beneficial outcome this week, and that we were close to aligning on something that reflected both the contribution I've made to Content Platform and the role you're asking me to step into. Your response suggests otherwise, there's been no acknowledgement of what I've delivered, and nothing on the table beyond a title change.

Given that you've raised the possibility of involving my union, it's clear we're further apart than I thought....

Hi Johan,

I had hoped we'd been working toward a mutually beneficial outcome this week, and that we were close to aligning on something that reflected both the contribution I've made to Content Platform and the role you're asking me to step into. Your response suggests otherwise; there's been no acknowledgement of what I've delivered, and nothing on the table beyond a title change.

Given that you've raised the possibility of involving my union, it's clear we're further apart than I thought....

Hi -

We will be sending a formal consultation request to the union start of next week to initiate the formal process. All to ensure we move things forward and eventually find a way foward. Since you are on vacation and an Easter break for all of us soon it will be time for you to consult with unionen and the local club. They know the procedure.

Johan

subject: Member query - potential disability discrimination during redeployment process
summary: Member query - potential disability discrimination during redeployment process

messages.bodyPreview:
Hi,

I'm a Unionen member (since March 2023) and I'd like advice on whether what's happened during my current HR process may constitute discrimination.

I'm a Senior Engineering Manager at Spotify, being redeployed to a Staff Engineer (IC) role. The reasoning I was given for the role change was feedback about how I communicate and that I "go too deep into root cause problems" — both of which are traits directly associated with my ADHD.

On 5 February, during the fourth HR conversation about t...
